nodes.title: Seamless Prompt
widgets_values: preserve the original material pattern and surface details, make it tileable and seamless, flat even lighting, top down orthographic PBR material texture

nodes.title: How To Use
widgets_values:
Set Seamless ON/OFF to false for fastest, detail-preserving PBR extraction.

Set it to true only when the source image has visible edges or needs tile repair.

If true erases detail, lower KSampler denoise further: try 0.10 to 0.15.

nodes.title: Seamless Detail Warning
widgets_values:
The old seamless denoise was 0.45. That can replace fine patterns, like treadplate diamonds.

This version defaults to 0.18.

For very detailed textures, use 0.10-0.15. For stronger edge repair, use 0.20-0.30.

nodes.title: Metalness Note
widgets_values:
Metalness now saves CHORD's direct metalness output.

The earlier inverted-roughness method often made grey maps. That is useful only as a fallback for some shiny surfaces, not as the default.

groups.title: 3. CHOOSE DIRECT OR SEAMLESS, THEN SET FINAL MAP SIZE
